chat.welcome: Hey there 🌿 Welcome to your safe space. I'm here to listen and help you build emotional resilience.
chat.crisis_message: It sounds like you're going through a really difficult time.
chat.voice_demo_transcript: This is a demo voice transcript — no real audio was processed.
chat.voice_demo_response: In demo mode, voice responses are simulated. Connect the backend to hear real AI voice responses! 🎙️

stage_text.seed: Your seed is planted and resting.
stage_text.sapling: Your sapling is growing strong leaves.
stage_text.young_tree: It's developing into a sturdy young tree.
stage_text.tree: A beautiful, strong tree stands tall.
stage_text.flourishing: Your tree is flourishing with immense beauty.

stats.title: Your Insights
stats.subtitle: Understanding your patterns
stats.no_data: Not enough data yet. Log your mood to see insights!

library.title: Coping Library
library.subtitle: Personalized strategies for your resilience toolkit

strategies.breathing_desc: Calm your nervous system with this timed breathing pattern.
strategies.journaling_desc: Express your thoughts freely with guided writing exercises.
strategies.grounding_desc: Reconnect with the present using your five senses.
strategies.relaxation_desc: Release physical tension from head to toe methodically.
strategies.reframing_desc: Challenge negative thoughts using CBT cognitive restructuring.
strategies.gratitude_desc: Shift focus to positivity by noting three good things daily.
strategies.visualization_desc: Imagine a calm, secure place whenever you feel overwhelmed.
strategies.compassion_desc: Write yourself a letter with the kindness you'd give a friend.

wall.title: Community
wall.subtitle: You are not alone in this journey
wall.post_placeholder: Share a thought, win, or struggle...
wall.empty: No posts yet. Be the first to share!

login.tagline: Your safe space for emotional wellness
login.toggle_to_signin: Already have an account? Sign in
login.privacy_text: We never collect your real name or email. Your nickname is your identity. Warning: If you forget your password, it cannot be recovered.
